content:
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Artificial intelligence is rapidly becoming a societal question -not simply a technological one.
Questions about governance, labour, human agency, responsibility, public trust, and institutional design are increasingly shaping how AI develops and how societies respond to it.
The A4G Intelex Essay Contest: AI, Work & Society invites contributions from students, working professionals, civil society representatives, policymakers, and business owners who wish to engage thoughtfully with these emerging challenges.
For more information: https://a4gcollab.org/essay-contest?others
At A4G Intelex, participation is treated as intellectual engagement rather than competition. The goal is to surface thoughtful perspectives and bring them into a wider conversation about the future relationship between AI, work, and society.
Early Bird Registration Opening Soon.
